ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All 7 required sections present (Meta, Purpose, Applicability, Rules, Exceptions, Checklist, Tool Integration)
All 7 rules properly formatted with severity [BLOCKER/CRITICAL/WARNING] and enforcement [BLOCKED/PREVENTED/REVIEWED] labels
Rule count of 7 falls within required 5-9 range
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples with clear violations and corrections
Related section clearly defines boundaries with Architecture, Security, and Observability agents with explicit handoffs
All enforcement tools specifically named (Backup Config Validator, Database Config Validator, etc.) with coverage levels
YAML frontmatter includes version: 1.0 and last_updated: 2026-04-09
Checklist contains exactly 7 items matching the 7 rules in same order
